flashcards.back: Maps binary inputs to outputs using Boolean algebra (f: Bⁿ → B).
Lists all 2ⁿ input combinations with outputs for an n-variable function.
SOP (sum of minterms) and POS (product of maxterms).
Minterm: AND term for output 1. Maxterm: OR term for output 0.
Graphical tool for simplifying Boolean expressions by grouping 1s/0s.
